title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk, but improper use or reliance on it without proper validation of results could lead to missed vulnerabilities or false positives. Additionally, if the tool has its own vulnerabilities, it could be exploited by attackers.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment to ensure its reliability and accuracy before integrating it into workflows.
Monitor the tool's repository for updates, potential vulnerabilities, or security advisories related to its usage.
Educate teams on the importance of validating results from automated tools and not solely relying on them for security assessments.

title: Rejected reason: This CVE ID has been rejected or withdrawn by its CVE Numbering Authority.
description: Rejected reason: This CVE ID has been rejected or withdrawn by its CVE Numbering Authority.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This CVE ID has been rejected or withdrawn, indicating that it is either invalid, a duplicate, or no longer considered a security threat. As such, it poses no risk.
recommended_actions: Verify the rejection status of the CVE with the CVE Numbering Authority or trusted sources.
Ensure that no unnecessary panic or actions are taken based on this CVE.
Monitor for any updates or corrections to this CVE in case it is reissued or replaced.

title: Subscriber Broken Access Control in Ads by WPQuads <= 3.0.3 versions.
description: Subscriber Broken Access Control in Ads by WPQuads <= 3.0.3 versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Ads by WPQuads <= 3.0.3 allows subscribers to bypass access controls, potentially enabling unauthorized users to manipulate or access restricted settings or data. This could lead to unauthorized ad placements, data exposure, or website defacement.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using WordPress
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Ads by WPQuads plugin to the latest patched version to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review user roles and permissions on your WordPress site to ensure subscribers have only the minimum access required.
Monitor logs for suspicious activity, particularly changes to ad settings or unauthorized access attempts.

title: phpUploader before 2.0.2 contains an unauthenticated information disclosure vulnerability that...
description: phpUploader before 2.0.2 contains an unauthenticated information disclosure vulnerability that allows remote attackers to access the full contents of the uploaded-files database table by visiting any page of the application. The index model executes an unbounded SELECT query and embeds the complete JSON-encoded result set in an inline script block, exposing uploader IP addresses, Argon2ID key hashes, internal filenames, and SHA-256 fingerprints.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56124.

title: CVE-2026-8157 - The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned
description: The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned when creating new users via one of its REST API endpoints, allowing authenticated users with a custom Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 role to escalate privileges to administrator.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8157.

title: CVE-2026-7859 - The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on on
description: The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on one of its AJAX actions, allowing unauthenticated attackers to modify arbitrary post metadata, such as the gallery, featured image and, on WooCommerce sites, product prices.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7859.

title: CVE-2026-6858 - The Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin before 1.14.0 does not sanitize and escape logs to be displaye
description: The Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin before 1.14.0 does not sanitize and escape logs to be displayed, allowing unauthenticated users to perform Stored XSS attacks against logged in administrator

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts into logs, which can execute when viewed by an administrator. This could lead to administrative account compromise, data theft, or further exploitation of the WordPress site.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using WordPress
recommended_actions: Update the Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin to version 1.14.0 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.
Regularly review and sanitize logs to identify and remove any suspicious entries.

title: CVE-2026-10530 - The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when gene
description: The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when generating its account verification tokens, allowing unauthenticated attackers to predict a valid token and activate an account without access to the associated email inbox.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10530.

title: CVE-2026-6645 - An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the Pa
description:
An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the PaperCut Print Deploy Client for Windows. The application, which typically operates with high-level system privileges, attempts to perform an internal validation check by invoking a secondary system utility using an unqualified file reference.



Because the application does not specify an absolute path to this utility, it relies on the operating system's default search order to locate the executable. Under specific conditions, a local attacker with the ability to modify directories within the system's search path could plant a malicious binary that mimics the expected utility. This could result in the malicious code being executed with SYSTEM privileges, leading to a full compromise of the affected host.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6645.

title: CVE-2026-8918 - A permissive list of allowed inputs in ASUS Armoury Crate allows a local administrator to perform ar
description:
A permissive list of allowed inputs in ASUS Armoury Crate allows a local administrator to perform arbitrary memory read/write operations or cause a system crash (BSOD) by bypassing the validation mechanism.Refer to the '
Security Update for Armoury Crate App ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8918.

title: CVE-2026-11748 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-auth-shiro versions prior to 0.84.0, wher
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-auth-shiro versions prior to 0.84.0, where the SearchFirstActiveDirectoryRealm substitutes the login username into an LDAP search filter without neutralizing LDAP filter metacharacters, allowing an unauthenticated attacker to manipulate the filter to cause authentication confusion and enumerate the directory structure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11748.

title: CVE-2026-11746 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server versions prior to 0.84.0, where enabling
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server versions prior to 0.84.0, where enabling ZooKeeper replication without setting replication.secret causes the server to silently fall back to a hard-coded, publicly known secret. This default credential authenticates the embedded ZooKeeper ensemble, allowing an attacker with network access to read the full replication log or join the quorum and execute arbitrary replicated commands across the cluster.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11746.

title: CVE-2026-11745 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-mirror-git versions prior to 0.84.0, wher
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-mirror-git versions prior to 0.84.0, where the Git mirror SSH client does not verify remote host keys for git+ssh:// connections, allowing an on-path attacker to perform man-in-the-middle attacks and compromise mirrored repositories.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11745.

title: CVE-2026-12823 - A security flaw has been discovered in Browserbase up to 20260526. This impacts an unknown function
description: A security flaw has been discovered in Browserbase up to 20260526. This impacts an unknown function of the component Autobrowse Trace Artifact Handler. The manipulation results in incorrect default permissions. The attack requires a local approach. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12823.

title: CVE-2026-12821 - A vulnerability was determined in FlowiseAI Flowise up to 3.1.2. The impacted element is an unknown
description: A vulnerability was determined in FlowiseAI Flowise up to 3.1.2. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file packages/components/nodes/documentloaders/S3/S3.ts of the component S3 Document Loader. Executing a manipulation can lead to path traversal. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

title: CVE-2026-12815 - A vulnerability has been found in coollabsio coolify 4.0.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the c
description: A vulnerability has been found in coollabsio coolify 4.0.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the component Image Name Handler. Such manipulation leads to os command injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way. The changelog for 4.1.2 mentions "[i]mproved image, branch, proxy, and deployment input validation".

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12815.
